articles.title: Evaluating CK Asset Holdings (SEHK:1113): Is There Hidden Value in the Recent Recovery?
articles.summary: CK Asset Holdings (SEHK:1113) has recently caught the eye of investors, with questions swirling about what’s in store for the real estate heavyweight. While no specific news event has driven recent moves, any change in momentum for a company of this scale is bound to trigger a closer look at its valuation. For anyone weighing whether to jump in or sit on the sidelines, recent price action could serve as an interesting signal worth dissecting. Over the past year, CK Asset Holdings has...

articles.title: Hong Kong's homebuyers brave storm signal at city's first post-rate cut property sales
articles.summary: Hong Kong's homebuyers defied a No 3 typhoon signal to snap up apartments during two property sales on Friday, entering the market after commercial banks lowered their prime lending rates a day earlier following the first rate cut by the local monetary authority. New World Development and CK Asset Holdings, two of the largest property developers in the city, sold 44 apartments, or 23 per cent of the 190 flats on offer at two locations as of 4.50pm on Friday, less than three hours after sales com
